titulo: Mapping the Mind of a Large Language Model
resumen: We have identified how millions of concepts are represented inside Claude Sonnet, one of our deployed large language models. This is the first ever detailed look inside a modern, production-grade large language model.
contenido:
We have identified how millions of concepts are represented inside Claude Sonnet, one of our deployed large language models. This is the first ever detailed look inside a modern, production-grade large language model.

[Leer artículo completo](https://www.anthropic.com/research/mapping-mind-language-model)
